subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Taqí, upon thee be My glory! There hath befallen the Wronged One in these days that which hath caused every man of insight to weep [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل تقی علیک بهائی قد ورد علی المظلوم فی هذه الایام ما ناح به کل عارف
subcodes.subjects: @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
